name: inherit_layout

templates.layout: |{% block block1 %}block 1 from layout{% endblock %}|{% block block2 %}block 2 from layout{% endblock %}|{% block block3 %}{% block block4 %}nested block 4 from layout{% endblock %}{% endblock %}|
templates.level1: {% extends 'layout' %}{% block block1 %}block 1 from level1{% endblock %}
templates.level2: {% extends 'level1' %}{% block block2 %}{% block block5 %}nested block 5 from level2{% endblock %}{% endblock %}
templates.level3: {% extends 'level2' %}{% block block5 %}block 5 from level3{% endblock %}{% block block4 %}block 4 from level3{% endblock %}
templates.level4: {% extends 'level3' %}{% block block3 %}block 3 from level4{% endblock %}

output: |block 1 from layout|block 2 from layout|nested block 4 from layout|
